---
title: "NT-plot"
output: null_document
---

# Setup
```{r}
library(pannagram)
library(ggplot2)
library(muscle)

```

# Files
```{r}

file.seqs = 'seqs_te.fasta'

```

# Read
```{r}
seqs = readFasta(file.seqs)
seq = seqs[1]
seq = revComplSeq(seq)



dotplot(seq, seq)
```


```{r}
p1 = ntplot(seq)
p1

```


```{r}
p2 = ntplot(seq, nt.separate = T)
p2

```


# Save
```{r}

savePNG(p1, path = '../images/', name = 'ntplot', width = 5, height = 3)
savePNG(p2, path = '../images/', name = 'ntplot_separate', width = 5, height = 3)


```
